backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a workshop POS system, defining types and state for inventory, transactions, work orders, shop settings, and user profiles, with role-based access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Kasir Bengkel' that mounts the React root and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with six routes (cashier, inventory, service, transactions, reports, settings), wraps the app in QueryClient and dark ThemeProvider, and renders a sidebar+outlet layout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts the user to enter their name and saves it via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation, blocking interaction until submitted.
frontend/src/components/Receipt.tsx: Print-friendly receipt component displaying shop info, transaction details, itemized list with quantities and prices, subtotal, optional discount, total, and an optional thank-you message.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Static dark sidebar component rendering navigation links for six app sections with active-state highlighting using TanStack Router's `useLocation`.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, initializes access control with an optional admin token, and invalidates all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, inventory, transactions, work orders, reports, and shop settings using an actor-based ICP backend.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for theming, and includes print styles for receipt printing.
frontend/src/lib/urlParams.ts: Utility module for storing, reading, and clearing work order navigation data (customer name, phone, vehicle info) via sessionStorage between pages.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, Indonesian Rupiah formatting, date/time formatting, and date-to-nanoseconds conversion for ICP timestamps.
frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts: Self-contained XLSX file writer and reader implemented without external dependencies, using browser CompressionStream/DecompressionStream APIs to build ZIP-based XLSX files.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CashierPage.tsx: Cashier POS page that allows searching inventory, managing a shopping cart, entering customer/vehicle info, creating transactions, and printing receipts.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page that displays goods and services in tabs, supporting add, edit stock, delete, import (XLSX), and export operations with search and low-stock indicators.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that renders a branded card with an Internet Identity login button for the Bengkel POS workshop management app.
frontend/src/pages/ReportsPage.tsx: Reports page with four tabs—daily, monthly, top-selling items, and profit/loss—each fetching data via query hooks and displaying results in cards and tables.
frontend/src/pages/ServicePage.tsx: Service/work-order management page allowing creation, viewing, completion, and deletion of work orders, with search filtering and navigation to a POS flow.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page for managing shop information (name, address, phone, thank-you message) and uploading a logo with progress tracking, persisted via query mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionHistoryPag: Transaction history page that lists all transactions with search and date-range filters, and supports viewing a receipt detail dialog with a print option.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color tokens (using oklch CSS variables), typography, border radius, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for 'Kasir Bengkel', recording a fix request to revert four files (backend/main.mo, CashierPage, InventoryPage, ServicePage) to their Draft Version 15 state after a failed production go-live at Version 21.
